---
title: "Appendix"
author: "Shakshi"
format:
  pdf:
    fig-cap-location: bottom
---

# AI USEAGE

This appendix contains notes, and supporting material for the main report.


![](Screenshot 1.png)
![](Screenshot 2.png)
![](Screenshot 3.png)
![](Screenshot 4.png)
![](Screenshot 5.png)
![](Screenshot 6.png)
![](Screenshot 7.png)
